# Pablo The Garden

> Pablo The Garden is an electronic music festival held in Morrovalle (MC), Marche, Italy. The 4th edition — the candy-themed "Sweet Edition" — takes place on 15–16 August 2026.

Key facts:

- Event: Pablo The Garden — Sweet Edition 2026 (4th edition)
- Dates: 15–16 August 2026 (Friday 15 and Saturday 16; doors from 18:00 CEST on day 1)
- Location: Morrovalle (MC), Marche, Italy
- Music: electronic (techno, house, melodic) with a hip-hop second stage ("Seconda Sala")
- Theme: "Sweet Edition" — candy/dolci world, immersive scenography, food & drink, fun zone
- Tickets (via Clappit): two-day Full Pass €35 (third release, on sale); single-day tickets €22 (Fri 15 / Sat 16); the first and second two-day releases are sold out
- Official site: https://pablothegarden.com (Italian default, English available)
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pablo_thegarden

## Lineup

- Friday 15 August: Olivieri, Tommy B, Giulio Zega, LOVRA, Nicola Torresi, Ercy (closing set), Carpa (hip-hop, second stage), Bato (second stage); plus one artist still to be announced.
- Saturday 16 August: Mutze, Michele Cesaretti, Elion, Stephani B, N4C, Citano Ballemo (second stage), Jacopo Galletta (hip-hop, second stage); plus one artist still to be announced.

## Pages

- [Home](https://pablothegarden.com/en): festival overview, lineup preview, tickets, countdown
- [Lineup](https://pablothegarden.com/en/lineup): full artist lineup by day
- [Tickets](https://pablothegarden.com/en/tickets): ticket releases, prices, practical info and FAQ
- [Gallery](https://pablothegarden.com/en/gallery): photos from past editions
- [About](https://pablothegarden.com/en/about): festival history, editions and team
- [Blog](https://pablothegarden.com/en/blog): news and announcements
- [Rules](https://pablothegarden.com/en/rules): entry rules and conduct
- [Contact](https://pablothegarden.com/en/contact): contact, media and partnership requests

## Editions

- 2023 — Parrot Edition
- 2024 — Jungle Edition
- 2025 — Flower Edition (6,500+ attendees)
- 2026 — Sweet Edition (candy theme)

## Optional

- [Italian homepage](https://pablothegarden.com/it)
- [Italian tickets page](https://pablothegarden.com/it/tickets)
